task: Construct a reproducible workbook or script that applies flood-depth fragility curve logic to the embedded loan-portfolio packet and produce a concise expert decision memo. Use only the embedded packet inputs. Produce: 1) flood_fragility_application.xlsx (or an equivalent reproducible script/notebook embedded in the workbook) containing all formulas/executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, and sensitivity calculations; and 2) portfolio_memo.md: concise expert memo with documented assumptions, validation, sensitivity notes, explicit pass/warn/fail classification per portfolio and final decision table. Follow rules: margin = normalized_threshold_score - observed_risk_score (negative = fail; 0-5% of limit = warn; >5% = pass). Remediation options may be combined only if total cost <= remediation_budget_usd. An expert-review flag is required if any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift. Do not invent inputs or use outside data; mark unresolved ambiguities as needs_review.
